mnemonics: NOTE: Neural networks, Optimization, Transformers, and Ethics are the four pillars of modern AI in this module.
keyPoints: Neural Networks form the foundation of deep learning and many AI applications.
Optimization techniques like gradient descent are crucial for training AI models effectively.
Transformer architectures, like those in GPT models, are state-of-the-art for natural language processing.
commonMistakes: Confusing neural networks with simpler machine learning models like decision trees.
Assuming all AI optimization problems can be solved with the same algorithm or learning rate.
Overlooking the ethical implications and biases inherent in AI training data and model outputs.
